completion_summary: Upgraded mechanism-family intervention contract to 0.3; replaced seed-0 epsilon detection with 5-seed x 5-recipe paired effect calibration; calibrated rate-law families into a detectable/noncatastrophic response band; retained structural and mass-balance controls; added opaque intervention version/hash trajectory binding; exact intervention payload is required out of band for replay and missing/tampered context fails closed. Audit passes all controls; 27/28 broad tests passed before updating the sole stale report-key assertion, then targeted tests and static checks passed.
notes: Public trajectory retains opaque intervention hashes only; exact intervention payload is supplied separately to maintainer replay. No hidden mechanism payload is exposed.
scope: Bind world/mechanism interventions to official trajectories and replay, replace single-midpoint epsilon checks with multi-seed multi-recipe severity calibration, and fail closed on unbound intervention evidence
